# Web Resources About R, RStudio, R Markdown, and Quarto

| AUTHOR                          | TITLE                                                                                                     |
|---------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **ABOUT R and the Tidyverse**   |                                                                                                           |
| Chester Ismay and Albert Y. Kim | [A ModernDive into R and the Tidyverse](https://moderndive.netlify.app/index.html)                        |
| Garrett Grolemund               | [Hands-On Programming with R](https://jjallaire.github.io/hopr/)                                          |
| Hadley Wickham                  | [R for Data Science](https://r4ds.had.co.nz/index.html)                                                   |
| Hadley Wickham                  | [R for Data Science (2e)](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/)                                                        |
| Frank E Harrell Jr              | [R Workflow](https://hbiostat.org/rflow/)                                                                 |
| Wright et al.                   | [Tidyverse Skills for Data Science](https://jhudatascience.org/tidyversecourse/)                          |
| Roger D Peng                    | [R Programming for Data Science](https://bookdown.org/rdpeng/rprogdatascience/)                           |
| **About ggplot2**               |                                                                                                           |
| Hadley Wickham et al.           | [ggplot2: Elegant Graphics for Data Analysis](https://ggplot2-book.org/index.html)                        |
| Winston Change                  | [R Graphics Cookbook, 2nd edition](https://r-graphics.org/)                                               |
| **ABOUT R Markdown**            |                                                                                                           |
| RStudio                         | [R Markdown](https://rmarkdown.rstudio.com/index.html)                                                    |
| RStudio                         | [R Markdown cheatsheet](https://www.rstudio.com/wp-content/uploads/2015/02/rmarkdown-cheatsheet.pdf)      |
| Garrett Grolemund               | [Introduction to R Markdown](https://rmarkdown.rstudio.com/articles_intro.html)                           |
| Ivan Millanes                   | [R Markdown Tips](https://appsilon.com/r-markdown-tips/)                                                  |
| **ABOUT Quarto**                |                                                                                                           |
| Dario Radečić                   | [R Quarto Tutorial](https://appsilon.com/r-quarto-tutorial/)                                              |
